text.title: Product Analytics Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure for applying product analytics end-to-end.

step.name: draft-events-from-spec
step.action: Use sonnet to author event specs (name, properties, owner) for the feature.
step.decision-gate: If any event has no owner, escalate before merging.

step.name: update-tracking-plan
step.action: Merge events into the versioned plan; bump plan_version.

step.name: publish-metric-tree
step.action: Author metric tree with North Star + 2-3 inputs + causal links.
step.decision-gate: If causal link absent, reject — vanity metric.

step.name: register-anomaly-rules
step.action: Author explicit anomaly rules (threshold per metric).

step.name: validate-and-deploy
step.action: Run lint + validator; deploy via CI.
